meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: ChatCut
products.tagline: Your AI video editor in ChatGPT, desktop, and web
products.summaryZh: ChatGPT、桌面端及网页版中的AI视频编辑器
products.descriptionZh: ChatCut 是一款轻量级、专业级的AI视频编辑器，无需剪辑经验即可上手。它如同一位专属剪辑助手，能理解你的素材、意图与时间线。你可以在同一界面完成结构性剪辑、精细裁切、添加字幕、B-roll、音乐、旁白、动态图形、素材库视频及AI生成视频。所有剪辑操作均在真实时间线上保持可编辑状态，并支持导出XML文件以便在其他软件中继续工作。
products.description: ChatCut is a lightweight, professional-grade AI video editor anyone can use, even without editing experience. It’s like having a personal video editing assistant that understands your footage, intent, and timeline. Make structural edits, fine-tune cuts, add captions, B-roll, music, voiceover, motion graphics, stock footage, and AI-generated video in one place. Every edit stays editable on a real timeline, with XML export when you want to keep working elsewhere.

products.name: Sim
products.tagline: Open-source workspace for AI agents and workflows
products.summaryZh: 开源AI智能体与工作流工作空间
products.descriptionZh: Sim 是一个开源工作空间，用于构建智能体工作流。可将您的 AI 智能体和工作流连接至 1000 多个集成与大型语言模型。
products.description: Sim is an open-source workspace to build agentic workflows. Connect your AI agents and workflows to 1,000+ integrations and LLMs.

products.name: PlugThis
products.tagline: Create your own Chrome Extensions by chatting with AI
products.summaryZh: 通过AI对话创建你自己的Chrome扩展
products.descriptionZh: 你想要一个每天能省下15分钟的Chrome扩展。你在Chrome应用商店搜过，没找到。现在只需用简单英语描述需求，PlugThis就能为你构建。代码归你所有。想修改？直接对话。需要登录或数据库？连接Supabase即可。准备发布？我们会生成商店所需的图标、截图和上架文案。别人做网页应用，我们做Chrome扩展。
products.description: You wanted a Chrome extension that would save you 15 minutes a day. You searched the Chrome Web Store, and it's not there. Now you can just describe it in plain English, and PlugThis builds it for you. The code is yours. Want changes? Chat. Need login or a database? Connect Supabase. Ready to publish? We generate the icons, screenshots, and listing copy the store asks for. Everyone else builds web apps. We build Chrome extensions.

products.name: Scarlett.
products.tagline: Your AI Co-Worker in Slack & iMessage
products.summaryZh: 你在 Slack 和 iMessage 中的 AI 同事
products.descriptionZh: 这不是又一个AI机器人，而是与你团队并肩工作的真正同事。赋予你的团队超能力，甚至让公司实现自动化运营。
products.description: Not another AI bot, a real colleague to work alongside your team. Give your team superpowers or even run your company on autopilot.

products.name: ConnectMachine 2.0
products.tagline: AI digital business card that remembers everyone you meet
products.summaryZh: AI数字名片，记住你遇到的每一个人
products.descriptionZh: 无限创建名片，秒速扫描纸质名片、LinkedIn二维码或胸牌，通过二维码、钱包或AirDrop分享。你的私人AI会记住你见过谁以及为何重要，并将所有人同步至CRM。数据加密，无公开动态。v2.0新增功能：团队计划支持品牌名片与管理员控制、AI笔记助手可生成会议记录与摘要、ShareBack实现即时双向交换、跟进提醒，以及全应用支持5种语言。多数功能基于用户需求开发。
products.description: Create unlimited business cards, scan any paper card, LinkedIn QR, or badge in seconds, and share via QR, Wallet, or AirDrop. Your private AI remembers who you met and why it mattered, then syncs everyone into your CRM. Encrypted, no public feed. New in v2.0: Team Plan with branded cards and admin controls, AI Note Taker for meeting transcripts and summaries, ShareBack for instant mutual exchange, follow-up reminders, and the full app in 5 languages. Much of it built from user requests.

products.name: GPT-5.6
products.tagline: A new standard for intelligence and efficiency
products.summaryZh: 智能与效率的新标准
products.descriptionZh: GPT-5.6 正在 API 中逐步推出！我们新的模型系列为开发者提供三种选择：Sol（针对最困难的智能体任务的旗舰模型）、Terra（适用于日常工作流的均衡模型）和 Luna（快速且经济高效）。GPT-5.6 还引入了程序化工具调用、多智能体（测试版）用于并行执行，以及显式提示缓存。7 月 23 日，我们将与 Product Hunt 合作举办 OpenAI Day。前五名发布项目将各获得 1 万美元的 API 积分。
products.description: GPT-5.6 is rolling out in the API! Our new family of models gives builders three options: Sol (our flagship model for the hardest agentic tasks), Terra (balanced for everyday workflows), and Luna (fast and cost-efficient). GPT-5.6 also introduces Programmatic Tool Calling, Multi-agent (beta) for parallel execution, and explicit prompt caching. On July 23, we're teaming up with Product Hunt for OpenAI Day. The top five launches will each receive $10K in API credits.

products.name: Juicy
products.tagline: Beautiful Mac battery alerts, health insights & charge limit
products.summaryZh: 精美的Mac电池提醒、健康洞察与充电限制
products.descriptionZh: Juicy 用精美的自定义提醒替代了 Apple 的基础电池警告，可在任意电量百分比下触发，并伴有屏幕光效和不容错过的声音。它还内置充电限制、按应用查看能耗、iPhone 和 iPad 电池健康、温度追踪，以及可自定义主题的菜单栏图标。一个轻量原生 Swift 应用，无需再堆叠 AlDente、coconutBattery 和 AirBuddy。一次购买，永久拥有。两次被 Apple 推荐为“我们喜爱的 App”。
products.description: Juicy replaces Apple's basic battery warnings with beautiful custom alerts at any percentage, complete with screen glow and sounds you can't miss. It also packs charge limiting, per-app energy insights, iPhone and iPad battery health, temperature tracking, and a themeable menu bar icon. One lightweight native Swift app instead of stacking AlDente, coconutBattery, and AirBuddy. Pay once, own forever. Featured twice by Apple as "Apps We Love".

products.name: Native SDK
products.tagline: Toolkit for building native desktop apps
products.summaryZh: 构建原生桌面应用的工具包
products.descriptionZh: Native SDK 是构建精美原生桌面应用的完整工具包：声明式标记、可预测的基于消息的状态模型、现代组件库，以及自有原生渲染器——无需浏览器，无需 WebView，无需妥协。
products.description: Native SDK is the complete toolkit for building beautiful native desktop applications: declarative markup, a predictable message-based state model, a modern component library, and its own native renderer — no browser, no WebView, no compromise.

products.name: Ship OS by Notion
products.tagline: The agent-native way to ship software
products.summaryZh: 以Agent原生方式交付软件
products.descriptionZh: 在 Notion 中运行整个产品开发周期，从客户反馈到合并 PR。代理负责分类、路由和总结。你的团队负责决策判断。
products.description: Run your entire product development cycle in Notion, from customer feedback to a merged PR. Agents handle the triaging, routing, and summarizing. Your team handles the judgment calls.

products.name: StoryChief Connect
products.tagline: Publish content from Claude to your website and socials
products.summaryZh: 将Claude的内容发布到你的网站和社交媒体。
products.descriptionZh: 在一个工作空间内，规划、创建并分发内容到所有渠道。StoryChief Connect 让 Claude 及你的营销团队能够访问执行真实营销活动所需的工具、数据、工作流程和发布渠道。连接你的技术栈，将信号转化为策略，为每个渠道创建内容。通过一个互联的内容日历进行协作、排期、发布和优化。StoryChief 帮助营销团队用更少的资源，交付更多成果。
products.description: Plan, create, and distribute content across every channel from one workspace. StoryChief Connect gives Claude, and your marketing team access to the tools, data, workflows, and publishing channels they need to execute real campaigns. Connect your stack. Turn signals into strategy. Create content for every channel. Collaborate, schedule, publish, and improve from one connected content calendar.ryChief helps marketing teams ship more, with less.

products.name: Muse Spark 1.1 by Meta AI
products.tagline: Multimodal reasoning model built for agentic tasks
products.summaryZh: 为智能体任务构建的多模态推理模型
products.descriptionZh: Meta超级智能实验室的最新模型，也是Muse Spark的重大升级。Muse Spark 1.1是一款专为智能体任务构建的多模态推理模型，在工具与计算机使用、编程及多模态理解方面实现了重大提升。
products.description: The latest model from Meta Superintelligence Labs and a significant upgrade from Muse Spark. Muse Spark 1.1 is a multimodal reasoning model built for agentic tasks, with major gains in tool and computer use, coding, and multimodal understanding.

products.name: Mispher
products.tagline: Dictate, rewrite, translate, and an agent in a single device
products.summaryZh: 一台设备集听写、改写、翻译和智能代理于一体。
products.descriptionZh: 设备端转录，外加一个真正能执行操作的智能体。转录支持：Parakeet EOU（英语）、Parakeet TDT（25种欧洲语言）、CTC（中文）、Nemotron（约40种语言）、Qwen3-ASR。询问功能：本地LFM2.5智能体，可规划并调用工具，支持Apple Notes、剪贴板、文件及MCP。完全可定制：重新映射拨盘、快捷键，三种HUD样式，工具审批，可替换任意模型或提示词。Gemma 4、Qwen3.6和Ornith 1.0即将推出。无需云端，无需账户。免费，MIT许可。适用于Apple Silicon、macOS 26。
products.description: On-device transcription, plus an agent that actually does things. Transcribe: Parakeet EOU (English), Parakeet TDT (25 European languages), CTC (Chinese), Nemotron (~40), Qwen3-ASR Ask: a local LFM2.5 agent that plans and calls tools, Apple Notes, clipboard, files, MCP support. Fully customizable: remap the dial, hotkeys, three HUD styles, tool approvals, swap any model or any prompt. Gemma 4, Qwen3.6 and Ornith 1.0 are coming next. No cloud, no accounts. Free, MIT. Apple Silicon, macOS 26.

products.name: Yasmine Works
products.tagline: An AI coworker that lives in your Slack to get work done
products.summaryZh: 一个驻留在Slack中的AI同事，帮你完成工作。
products.descriptionZh: Yasmine 是一款驻留在 Slack 中的 AI 同事。每个频道都会成为一个拥有独立记忆、工具和集成的团队成员。连接你的工具并提及它，即可完成实际工作——邮件、文档、数据、代码，任何内容。它运行在你自己的 Claude 订阅上，完全隔离。由 Yasmine 开发。
products.description: Yasmine is an AI coworker that lives in your Slack. Each channel becomes a teammate with its own memory, its tools and integrations. Connect your tools and mention it to get real work done — email, docs, data, code, anything. It runs on your own Claude subscription, fully isolated. By Yasmine

products.name: ReactCamera.com
products.tagline: Add yourself to any photo or video
products.summaryZh: 将你自己添加到任何照片或视频中
products.descriptionZh: 将自己放入任何照片或视频中，即时反应。React Camera 会将你从背景中分离并置入场景，随后可添加字幕和贴纸进行分享。完全隐私且设备端处理——无需登录。
products.description: Drop yourself into any photo or video and react. React Camera cuts you out and places you in the scene, then add captions and stickers to share. 100% private and on-device — no login required.

products.name: Qlane
products.tagline: Merge PRs with confidence - AI QA that runs your whole app
products.summaryZh: 合并PR时更有信心——AI质量检查覆盖整个应用
products.descriptionZh: 大多数工具都停留在某条界限的一侧。AI代码审查工具只读取差异却从不运行代码，因此只能猜测"这里可能为空"。黑盒端到端工具虽然驱动真实浏览器，但只能看到DOM。Qlane在沙盒中启动整个应用并从内部进行测试——涵盖浏览器、Shell、源码，以及可连接的日志和数据库——因此只报告可复现的缺陷，并将每个缺陷追溯到根本原因。它运行的是你的应用，而不仅仅是你的代码。
products.description: Most tools sit on one side of a line. AI code-review tools read the diff but never run it, so they guess "this could be null." Black-box E2E tools drive a real browser but see only the DOM. Qlane boots your whole app in a sandbox and tests it from the inside - browser, shell, source, plus connectable logs and database - so it reports only bugs that actually reproduce, and traces each to its root cause. runs your app, not just your code.

products.name: Latenode AI Workflow Builder
products.tagline: Create AI automations & agents using prompts
products.summaryZh: 使用提示词创建AI自动化流程与智能体
products.descriptionZh: 停止手动构建自动化流程。只需描述你想要自动化的内容，AI Agent Builder 即可创建可直接投入生产的 AI 智能体，并将其连接到你的工具、业务数据和 AI 模型。借助 5,500 多个集成和内置编排功能，团队可在数分钟内启动复杂的 AI 工作流。
products.description: Stop building automations manually. Just describe what you want to automate, and AI Agent Builder creates a production-ready AI agent connected to your tools, business data, and AI models. With 5,500+ integrations and built-in orchestration, teams can launch complex AI workflows in minutes.

products.name: Archly
products.tagline: Production-ready prompts for Lovable, Cursor & Claude Code
products.summaryZh: 面向Lovable、Cursor和Claude Code的生产级提示词
products.descriptionZh: 大多数提示工具只是改写你的想法并原样返回。Archly 通过7步信息采集流程，帮你挖掘出连你自己都没意识到的关键细节，然后针对你使用的具体平台（Lovable、Bolt、v0、Cursor、Claude Code、Replit 等）精心设计提示。添加你的个人档案（技术栈、风格、偏好）后，每个生成的提示都已了解你的构建方式。这不是一个提示生成器，而是一个提示工作区——可复用的技能、保存的上下文、能直接上手的提示。
products.description: Most prompt tools paraphrase your idea and hand it back. Archly interviews you a 7-step intake flow that pulls out the details you didn't know mattered, then engineers a prompt built for your specific platform: Lovable, Bolt, v0, Cursor, Claude Code, Replit, and more. Add your Profile DNA (your stack, your style, your preferences) and every prompt comes out already knowing how you build. It's not a prompt generator. It's a prompt workspace, reusable skills, saved context, prompts that ship.

products.name: Vibe-check skill
products.tagline: Stop your AI from building the wrong app
products.summaryZh: 阻止你的AI构建错误的应用程序
products.descriptionZh: 每项编程技能都始于你决定要构建什么之后。vibe-check 覆盖了此前的阶段——那个让大多数项目折戟的阶段。它能从你模糊的想法中挖掘出真正的问题，对照 Reddit 上人们真实抱怨的内容进行压力测试，并为你的 AI 代理提供一份可遵循的蓝图。它甚至能告诉你“不行”——一个真正的否决结论。其他技能帮你把事情做对，而这项技能确保你做的是对的事。
products.description: Every coding skill starts after you've decided what to build. vibe-check covers the part before, the part that sinks most projects. It digs out the real problem under your vague idea, pressure-tests it against what people actually gripe about on Reddit, and hands your AI agent a blueprint to follow. It can even tell you no, a real no-go verdict. Other skills help you build it right. This one makes sure you're building the right thing.

products.name: Shotgun - AI Cofounder Framework
products.tagline: Don't Build Solo. Let Shotgun Ride Along.
products.summaryZh: 不要独自构建。让Shotgun与你同行。
products.descriptionZh: 一个开源"操作系统"，能将你偏好的AI智能体转化为独立创业者专属的持久化虚拟联合创始人。它兼容所有AI智能体，并为Claude Code、Cursor、Antigravity、Gemini CLI及GitHub Copilot提供原生级集成。一行命令即可完成安装，`shotgun-init`能将完整操作系统注入任意文件夹或现有代码库，仅需一次初始化配置，此后智能体将始终了解你的创业项目、记忆所有信息、构建产品并保持数据有序。
products.description: An open-source "operating system" that turns your favorite AI agent into a persistent, personalized virtual cofounder for solo founders. It works on any AI agent, with first-class wiring for Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, Gemini CLI, and GitHub Copilot. One line installs it, `shotgun-init` injects the full OS into any folder or existing codebase, you run onboarding once, and from then on the agent knows your venture, remembers everything, builds your product, and keeps your data organized.

products.name: RepStandard
products.tagline: Computer vision counts your reps in real time
products.summaryZh: 计算机视觉实时统计你的动作次数
products.descriptionZh: 大多数健身应用需要你手动记录组数，或依赖可穿戴设备估算运动强度。RepStandard的摄像头能自动计数——深蹲、俯卧撑、仰卧起坐和平板支撑，通过设备端姿态检测实时追踪（数据不会离开你的手机）。它还会根据你的进步生成自适应每日计划，并将坚持转化为游戏化体验：排名、经验值、连续打卡记录和可分享的证书。
products.description: Most fitness apps make you manually log sets or need a wearable to guess your effort. RepStandard's camera does the counting for you - squats, push-ups, sit-ups, and plank, tracked in real time via on-device pose detection (nothing leaves your phone). It also builds an adaptive daily program that scales with your progress, and turns consistency into a game: ranks, XP, streaks, and shareable certificates.
